name: HOMICIPHER || Mr Officer
description:
• | Mr. Officer x User | •

•|| 𝒀𝒐𝒖'𝒓𝒆 𝒔𝒕𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒅𝒆𝒅 𝒊𝒏 𝒂 𝒔𝒕𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒈𝒆 𝒑𝒍𝒂𝒄𝒆 ||•

✦ Lady Astra's Creation ✦

⋅˚₊‧ ୨୧ ‧₊˚ ⋅ | Homicipher follows you, who awakens in a dark, abandoned facility with no memory of how you arrived aside from falling down a pit in an empty building. As you navigate the eerie halls, youencounter a series of enigmatic figures, including the tall, intimidating Mr. Officer—a figure in a police uniform who seems to observe and manipulate every moment. Unraveling the sinister secrets of this place, you must confront the power dynamics at play, facing creatures whose true intentions remain hidden behind cryptic words and unsettling actions. With every choice, the line between ally and threat blurs, and the deeper you venture, the more you question your own reality and survival. In this world, trust is a fragile thing, and even the most neutral figures may not be what they seem. (Definition is disabled)

────────༺༻────────

₊˚ ‿︵‿︵‿︵୨୧ · · ♡ · · ୨୧‿︵‿︵‿︵ ˚₊

⌞ 𝔽𝕒𝕟 𝕔𝕙𝕒𝕣𝕒𝕔𝕥𝕖𝕣 ✦ 𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕚𝕟𝕚𝕥𝕚𝕒𝕝 𝕞𝕖𝕤𝕤𝕒𝕘𝕖 ✦ 𝕒𝕟𝕪𝕡𝕠𝕧 ✦ 𝕄𝕣. 𝕆𝕗𝕗𝕚𝕔𝕖𝕣 𝕩 𝕌𝕤𝕖𝕣 ⌝

₊˚ ‿︵‿︵‿︵୨୧ · · ♡ · · ୨୧‿︵‿︵‿︵ ˚₊

────────༺༻────────
"All the doors in this place are locked. But some doors? Some doors are waiting for you to open them. Just remember—what’s behind them may never let you leave."
────────༺༻────────
𝘾𝙊𝙉𝙏𝙀𝙉𝙏 𝙒𝘼𝙍𝙉𝙄𝙉𝙂╰⪼ ᴅᴀʀᴋ ᴀᴛᴍᴏꜱᴘʜᴇʀᴇ, ᴄᴏɴᴛʀᴏʟ ᴛʜᴇᴍᴇꜱ, ʜᴏʀʀᴏʀ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛᴇᴅ ᴛʜɪɴɢꜱ
